# Third-Party Libraries

Vendored single-header audio decoders used by Cedar on all platforms (native and WASM).

| Library | Version | License | Source |
|---------|---------|---------|--------|
| stb_vorbis.c | latest | Public Domain | https://github.com/nothings/stb |
| dr_flac.h | latest | Public Domain (Unlicense / MIT-0) | https://github.com/mackron/dr_libs |
| minimp3.h + minimp3_ex.h | latest | CC0 | https://github.com/lieff/minimp3 |
| tsf.h | v0.9 | MIT | https://github.com/schellingb/TinySoundFont |

All libraries are public domain or equivalent permissive licenses (tsf.h is MIT).
